name: Oriana Power - SME play on Renewable Energy

posts.author: Indronl_Roy
posts.community: Oriana Power - SME play on Renewable Energy
posts.text: But now it’s transiting to IPP , BESS and green Ammonia manufacture, I think market need revenue or more clarity

posts.author: meekinvestor
posts.community: Oriana Power - SME play on Renewable Energy
posts.text: Last two days markets, have tanked badly. So, this may not be the right time to judge. Even Data Centre stocks like Netweb have faced trouble.

posts.author: anjeshv4
posts.community: Oriana Power - SME play on Renewable Energy
posts.text: EPC companies are out of favour right now. Data centre stocks are the flavour of the season. The stock will do well in time. Provided perfomance remains consistent.
